queries.sql: SELECT `ospos_items`.*, GROUP_CONCAT(attribute_value SEPARATOR '|') AS attribute_values, GROUP_CONCAT(attribute_decimal SEPARATOR '|') AS attribute_dvalues, GROUP_CONCAT(attribute_date SEPARATOR '|') AS attribute_dtvalues FROM `ospos_items` LEFT JOIN `ospos_attribute_links` ON `ospos_attribute_links`.`item_id` = `ospos_items`.`item_id` LEFT JOIN `ospos_attribute_values` ON `ospos_attribute_links`.`attribute_id` = `ospos_attribute_values`.`attribute_id` WHERE `ospos_items`.`item_id` = 1 GROUP BY `ospos_items`.`item_id`

queries.hover: This query was called more than once.

queries.sql: INSERT IGNORE INTO `ospos_attribute_links` (`item_id`, `definition_id`, `attribute_id`, `sale_id`) SELECT 1, definition_id, attribute_id, 1 FROM ospos_attribute_links WHERE item_id = 1 AND sale_id IS NULL AND receiving_id IS NULL

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT `ospos_items`.*, GROUP_CONCAT(attribute_value SEPARATOR '|') AS attribute_values, GROUP_CONCAT(attribute_decimal SEPARATOR '|') AS attribute_dvalues, GROUP_CONCAT(attribute_date SEPARATOR '|') AS attribute_dtvalues FROM `ospos_items` LEFT JOIN `ospos_attribute_links` ON `ospos_attribute_links`.`item_id` = `ospos_items`.`item_id` LEFT JOIN `ospos_attribute_values` ON `ospos_attribute_links`.`attribute_id` = `ospos_attribute_values`.`attribute_id` WHERE `ospos_items`.`item_id` = 1 GROUP BY `ospos_items`.`item_id`

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: INSERT IGNORE INTO `ospos_attribute_links` (`item_id`, `definition_id`, `attribute_id`, `sale_id`) SELECT 1, definition_id, attribute_id, 1 FROM ospos_attribute_links WHERE item_id = 1 AND sale_id IS NULL AND receiving_id IS NULL

return_policy => string (332) "Thank you for your business! Return & Exchange Policy: 1. Returns/Exchanges ...
$value['return_policy']
Thank you for your business!
Return & Exchange Policy:
1. Returns/Exchanges accepted within 30 days of purchase with original receipt.
2. Items must be unused, undamaged, and in their original packaging.
3. For tiles, only full, unopened boxes will be accepted for return.
4. Delivery/transportation charges are non-refundable.
